tasks.title: Scaffold the planned crate workspace
tasks.description: Create the five planned libraries with inherited metadata and the documented dependency direction.
acceptance_criteria: All six crates build in the workspace.
Docs identify the created crates and dependency direction.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Define protocol IDs, framing, and version handshake
tasks.description: Implement newtype IDs, postcard length framing, and version mismatch handling in cloo-proto.
acceptance_criteria: Every wire type round-trips.
Incompatible versions fail with a clear reattach error.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Implement the pure layout tree
tasks.description: Add ratio-based split, close, collapse, rectangle assignment, and minimum-size rejection to cloo-core.
acceptance_criteria: Table-driven tests cover every layout operation.
Zero-size PTYs are rejected without changing layout.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Wrap terminal emulation behind cloo-term
tasks.description: Pin and wrap terminal emulation behind cloo-owned feed, cell, resize, and scrollback APIs.
acceptance_criteria: SGR, alternate-screen, and resize fixtures update the grid.
No crate outside cloo-term imports alacritty_terminal.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Add a single-pane PTY reactor
tasks.description: Spawn a Unix PTY, route reads through cloo-term, and restore PTY resources safely.
acceptance_criteria: A scripted shell integration test produces grid output.
PTY read errors return Results and unsafe blocks have SAFETY comments.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Render a grid and restore client terminal state
tasks.description: Implement raw-mode guarding, deterministic full-grid rendering, and restoration on every client exit path.
acceptance_criteria: Fake-grid rendering is tested deterministically.
Raw mode is restored on normal, error, panic, and signal paths.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Ship the one-pane local CLI smoke path
tasks.description: Wire the binary, single PTY, and renderer into a foreground shell with ordinary input forwarding.
acceptance_criteria: cloo launches and renders a shell.
No socket or daemon behavior is introduced in this task.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Create the daemon socket lifecycle
tasks.description: Add scoped session socket creation, daemon ownership, stale-socket cleanup, and startup errors.
acceptance_criteria: Only one daemon owns a session socket.
Cleanup never removes unrelated sockets.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Implement attach, hello, and detach
tasks.description: Connect clients over the Unix socket, validate handshake, send the initial snapshot, and detach without killing PTYs.
acceptance_criteria: Attach delivers a session snapshot.
Detach leaves the child running and handshake mismatch is clear.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Serialize input and resize through the session task
tasks.description: Route input and SIGWINCH resize through mpsc commands, TIOCSWINSZ, and one layout pass.
acceptance_criteria: No session mutex is introduced.
Resize updates both grid and PTY in an integration test.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Coalesce damage and client grid diffs
tasks.description: Fan out bounded-frame row damage and redraw only changed client cells.
acceptance_criteria: Burst output produces bounded updates.
Lagging clients resync without blocking the session task.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Prove detach and reattach survival
tasks.description: Add end-to-end session-survival coverage and reconnect flow for live child processes.
acceptance_criteria: A scripted child survives disconnect and reconnect.
Scrollback and cleanup are verified.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Negotiate baseline terminal capabilities
tasks.description: Define attach-time capabilities for interactive agent-harness compatibility and documented fallbacks.
acceptance_criteria: TermCaps round-trips over the handshake.
Unsupported combinations choose documented fallbacks.
An attach whose TERM is unset or dumb is refused with an actionable error rather than degraded, per DECISIONS.md RESOLVED-12; the local in-process pane still runs with no capabilities.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Route extended input, paste, focus, and mouse modes
tasks.description: Implement negotiated extended keys, bracketed paste, focus events, and SGR mouse routing.
acceptance_criteria: Fixtures cover every negotiated input mode.
Chrome and application mouse ownership are distinguishable.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Model typed outer-terminal effects
tasks.description: Represent allowlisted outer-terminal effects as typed versioned events instead of raw OSC or DCS passthrough.
acceptance_criteria: Arbitrary raw passthrough is impossible in the type model.
Effect types round-trip and represent unavailable graphics.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Apply client policy to outer-terminal effects
tasks.description: Apply per-client allowlists and capability checks to supported effects with safe suppression.
acceptance_criteria: Allowed effects reach a capable client once.
Denied effects leave the grid and terminal state intact.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Add session commands for split and close
tasks.description: Connect layout operations to PTY creation, close, and collapse through the session actor.
acceptance_criteria: Split and close update layout and PTY ownership atomically.
Rejected splits leave layout unchanged.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Add directional focus and pane zoom
tasks.description: Implement pure directional focus selection and reversible focused-pane zoom.
acceptance_criteria: Traversal and zoom are unit tested.
Zoom preserves split ratios and never restarts a PTY.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Render pane headers and approved focus treatment
tasks.description: Render headers, accent borders, dimmed neighbors, compact truncation, and a no-dim fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Focus and attention render as distinct states.
Narrow-pane and no-dim renderer tests pass.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Define profile and pane-metadata models
tasks.description: Add validated profiles, names, task labels, cwd, dimensions, attention state, and provenance types.
acceptance_criteria: Built-in generic, Codex, and Claude profiles are data only.
Validation is pure and has no vendor dependency.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Load and validate profile configuration
tasks.description: Parse local profile definitions and merge them with built-ins without unrelated live reload work.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid profiles warn and fall back safely.
Command templates and size recommendations are tested.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Launch panes from an explicit profile
tasks.description: Add CLI and session commands to launch profiles with user-provided name, task label, and cwd.
acceptance_criteria: Profile selection never infers a task from child output.
Missing executables fail clearly and metadata enters snapshots.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Persist explicit attention state in the session actor
tasks.description: Add session commands and snapshots for attention state, source, and acknowledgment.
acceptance_criteria: State updates are serialized through the session task.
Uninstrumented children default to unknown and wire state round-trips.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Connect generic attention sources
tasks.description: Map bells, child exits, and explicit user marks to provenance-aware session attention updates.
acceptance_criteria: Bell and lifecycle fixtures set one coalesced state event.
No transcript or process-name matcher exists.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Expose a local adapter control interface
tasks.description: Add a narrow local socket command for opt-in adapters to report advisory pane state and source.
acceptance_criteria: Adapters can update only permitted pane state.
Invalid updates fail and adapter provenance remains visible.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Render attention summary and queue
tasks.description: Add attention count, keyboard queue, focus and acknowledge actions, and bounded toast coalescing.
acceptance_criteria: Queue order and coalescing are deterministic.
Every state has text, glyph, and color rendering.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Implement tab lifecycle in cloo-core
tasks.description: Add named tabs, active selection, and tab-local pane and layout ownership to the pure session model.
acceptance_criteria: Create, rename, select, and close are unit tested.
Closing a tab has defined active-tab behavior.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Synchronize and render tabs
tasks.description: Carry tab snapshots and commands over the protocol and render a compact top tab row.
acceptance_criteria: Tab wire types round-trip.
Switching tabs does not restart pane PTYs.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Implement the always-on minimal status bar
tasks.description: Render one row containing session, active tab, attention count, and prefix hint with width yielding.
acceptance_criteria: Required fields survive narrow widths.
16-color and ASCII fallbacks are tested.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Add session switcher and profile launcher overlays
tasks.description: Implement keyboard-first session, profile-launch, and pane-details overlays using shared chrome rules.
acceptance_criteria: Overlays are keyboard navigable and dismissible.
Launch uses explicit profiles only.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Implement validated configuration and SIGHUP reload
tasks.description: Load full configuration and apply atomic validated reloads without putting file I/O in cloo-core.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid reload keeps the previous valid configuration.
Valid reload applies without restart.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Add configurable keymap resolution
tasks.description: Parse bindings into Action values and resolve conflicts while preserving C-b defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Defaults, overrides, conflicts, and invalid bindings are tested.
Application input is not consumed outside a recognized prefix.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Render theme tokens and 16-color fallbacks
tasks.description: Implement Storm and named themes, terminal-palette inheritance, and semantic renderer fallbacks.
acceptance_criteria: All style-guide tokens map deterministically.
Focus and attention remain distinct without true color.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Add interruptible reduced-motion transitions
tasks.description: Implement 120ms focus, split, close, and overlay motion under the frame cap and reduce-motion setting.
acceptance_criteria: Input, resize, and state changes interrupt active motion.
Motion never emits per-PTY-read updates.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Implement server-side copy and search state
tasks.description: Add scrollback selection, vim-like navigation, and regex search as session-owned state.
acceptance_criteria: Copy and search state survives client changes.
Regex errors return cleanly and operations are tested.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Render copy mode and perform explicit OSC 52 copy
tasks.description: Render copy and search highlights and use typed clipboard effects only when client policy permits.
acceptance_criteria: Selection does not mutate the authoritative grid.
Denied clipboard policy is safe and fixture tested.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Route mouse ownership between chrome and child apps
tasks.description: Determine per event whether mouse input belongs to cloo chrome or an application SGR mode.
acceptance_criteria: Application mouse events are not stolen.
Chrome events never leak into pane text input.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Add click focus, gutter drag, and scrollback wheel actions
tasks.description: Implement chrome mouse actions with ratio resize and existing focus or copy-mode commands.
acceptance_criteria: Gutter drag changes ratios only.
Click focus and wheel scrolling have keyboard equivalents.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Fix the hanging mouse-delivery session tests
tasks.description: The session actor stops answering snapshot() once every pane child has exited, so wait_for_text in the M6-01 mouse fixtures blocks past its deadline and cargo test --workspace never returns. Raising the session event channel capacity did not fix it, so find the real stall before re-enabling both tests.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace completes without a timeout, with no test skipped.
a_mouse_event_for_a_closed_pane_is_dropped and a_mouse_event_reaches_the_pane_it_names_and_not_the_focused_one both run and pass.
Each fixture is confirmed non-vacuous by reverting deliver_mouse to the focused pane and watching it fail.
A snapshot request after every pane child has exited is proved to return rather than block.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Harden terminal detection and reconnect races
tasks.description: Finish TERM and true-color detection plus stale-client, reconnect, and resize-race handling.
acceptance_criteria: Capability failures are actionable.
Reconnect-race fixtures do not corrupt grids and protocol changes bump handshake.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Build the deterministic compatibility fixture suite
tasks.description: Add integration fixtures for required and negotiated terminal capability sequences.
acceptance_criteria: Fixtures cover screens, paste, keys, focus, mouse, effects, and resize.
No fixture requires a vendor CLI or account.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Record Codex and Claude compatibility smoke matrix
tasks.description: Run and document the manual compatibility matrix on supported outer terminals.
acceptance_criteria: Results record harness and terminal versions.
Optional graphics degradation and fallbacks are documented without credentials.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace

tasks.title: Package the working CLI for supported targets
tasks.description: Build release artifacts and npm optional-dependency packaging without publishing either registry.
acceptance_criteria: Release builds are reproducible for four targets.
npm exposes cloo and automation has no publish command.
commands: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace
